task_completion.description: Open the PaymentService.java file in the IDE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IDE (likely Eclipse) is open with the file 'PaymentService.java' visible in the editor.

task_completion.description: Invoke the 'Change Method Signature' refactoring tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Change Method Signature' (or similar IDE equivalent) is open for the 'processPayment' method.

task_completion.description: Add the 'currency' parameter with the correct type and default value
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the refactoring dialog's parameter list, there is a new entry with Type 'String', Name 'currency', and Default value '"USD"'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'priority' parameter with the correct type and default value
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the refactoring dialog's parameter list, there is a new entry with Type 'boolean', Name 'priority', and Default value 'false'.

task_completion.description: Apply the refactoring and verify the method signature is updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows the 'processPayment' method signature updated to include the new parameters: '(String customerId, double amount, String currency, boolean priority)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that call sites across the project were updated automatically
task_completion.visual_evidence: Another Java file (e.g., Main.java, OrderProcessor.java) or a refactoring preview window shows a call to 'processPayment' updated with the default arguments, e.g., 'processPayment(..., ..., "USD", false)'.

integrity.description: The agent used the IDE's built-in refactoring tool rather than manual text replacement
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the 'Change Method Signature' GUI dialog being used, confirming the agent didn't just manually type the changes across all files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts (sed, awk, python) to bypass IDE usage
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands executing mass text replacement scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted genuinely with the IDE interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard IDE UI elements (menus, context menus, dialogs, editor tabs) being actively navigated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/PaymentPlatform. The target file is src/main/java/com/acme/payment/PaymentService.java. The expected updated method signature should match the regex: processPayment\s*\(\s*String\s+\w+,\s*double\s+\w+,\s*String\s+currency,\s*boolean\s+priority\s*\). The updated call sites should match: processPayment\s*\([^,]+,[^,]+,\s*"USD",\s*false\s*\). There are exactly 16 call sites across 7 files (OrderProcessor, SubscriptionManager, RefundHandler, BatchProcessor, CheckoutController, Main, PaymentServiceTest) that must be updated automatically by the refactoring tool.
